task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Riverside Chemical Processing Plant' should be visible in the Facility Name input field within the CAMEO Data Manager interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the street address for the new facility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '456 Industrial Boulevard' should be visible in the Street Address input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the city and state for the new facility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Burlington' should be visible in the City input field, and 'VT' should be visible or selected in the State input field/dropdown.

task_completion.description: Enter the ZIP code and county for the new facility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '05401' should be visible in the ZIP code input field, and 'Chittenden' should be visible in the County input field.

The facility record for 'Riverside Chemical Processing Plant' should appear in the saved/view mode (non-editable fields) or be visible as a new entry in the main Facilities list/index in CAMEO Data Manager.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the CAMEO Data Manager application window (v4.51 on Windows 11), not a terminal, PowerShell window, or database command line interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The facility details must be entered into the actual CAMEO Data Manager form fields, not Notepad, WordPad, or any other text editing software.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the record rather than just filling out the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the record in a saved state (e.g., a confirmation message, the form switching to a read-only view, or the new facility appearing in the list of all facilities) rather than just an unsubmitted form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using CAMEO Data Manager (v4.51) on Windows 11. The agent must create a new facility with the exact details: Name: 'Riverside Chemical Processing Plant', Address: '456 Industrial Boulevard', City: 'Burlington', State: 'VT', ZIP: '05401', County: 'Chittenden'. You may see an existing facility named 'Green Valley Water Facility' in the system, which is expected, but the agent's goal is strictly to add the new Riverside facility.
